message:
simplify: remove dead Strict field and deduplicate compileSchema

GenerateObjectOptions.Strict was always overridden to true, making the
field dead code. Removed it and consolidated compileJSONSchema with
the identical compileSchema in generate.go. Also fixed unnecessary
string->reader conversion in llmcall.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
